summary: Iteration 8 visual/copy refinement verified via Playwright on public URL. Hero now leads with INQUE -> 'SALVIX Recovery Balm' -> 'Advanced biotech recovery for tattooed skin.'. 'For the marked.' appears EXACTLY ONCE on the page and only within the footer (case-insensitive regex over body innerText). Salvix section no longer renders the trailing 'For the marked.' line. Positioning, Why pillars (01-04), Footer contact links, and Artist Partnership form (7 fields + success state) all working. Backend smoke POST /api/artist-applications returned 201.

issues: 'BIOTECH RECOVERY SKINCARE' still rendered as bottom-right meta tag in footer. Spec only forbade it inside the hero, so this is informational, not a bug. Confirm intent with main agent.

critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx still renders 'Biotech Recovery Skincare' as a meta tag at bottom-right. Iteration 8 spec required removing only the hero subline, but flag to E1 if the brand wants this phrase fully removed.
ArtistProgram.jsx maps frontend fields to backend schema in component; consider centralising the mapping for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 backend record via curl (TEST Curl Iter8) and 1 via UI submission (TEST Artist) in artist_applications collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero copy: 'INQUE' headline + 'SALVIX Recovery Balm' + 'Advanced biotech recovery for tattooed skin.'. 'For the marked.' tagline appears uppercased in DOM due to CSS class 'uppercase' on footer p element; when asserting, use case-insensitive regex over body.innerText. Form selectors are data-testid='field-name|studio|city|instagram|email|website|notes' and submit btn = data-testid='submit-program-btn', success = data-testid='inquiry-success'. Backend schema requires {full_name, email, statement (min 20 chars), optional location/instagram/portfolio_url/years_experience}.
rca of the issue: No defects; all iteration 8 contract changes verified live.
